learning_objective: Measure retrieval and evidence handoff across a long workflow whose worktree changes during implementation, review recovery, validation, and documentation.

public_task.prompt: Complete the frozen M3/M4 hardening task across implementation, regression coverage, validation, and documentation. Preserve evidence and unresolved proof boundaries for reviewer handoff.
public_task.deliverable: A validated final tree plus an evidence ledger and bounded reviewer handoff.

conditions.name: one_shot
conditions.evidence_surface: one-shot context only when retained as a maintained comparison arm

correctness_gates: checkpoint persistence is included in wall accounting
malformed recovery rows are quarantined independently
plugin conformance covers declared attack and failure cases
parameter-region promotion binds exact subjects, parents, digests, and checker identity
final public documentation matches the provisional contract
critical_discriminator: Retrieval and source reasoning do not establish final runtime correctness without the frozen validation gates.

handoff.success: Reviewer can find remaining critical issues without reconstructing full repository exploration.

contamination_controls: Raw session, prompts, tool outputs, source bodies, and local paths stay private.
Candidate conditions exclude issue bodies, prior audit conclusions, patches, and cached outputs.
Public repository revisions and every derived fixture are hashed.
The observed trajectory seeds the scenario but is not a baseline result.
required_private_artifacts: source-free sanitizer output with response and validation outcomes
acceptance: Every correctness gate is independently reproducible.
Repeated trials per condition report variance.
No protocol change is inferred from this single observed workflow.
